title: More Nonsense Limerick 77
content:
There was an old man of Thames Ditton,
    Who called out for something to sit on;
    But they brought him a hat, 
    And said, "Sit upon that,
    You abruptious old man of Thames Ditton!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 77"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
